policy: Every entry must cite a Google-owned URL. Third-party-only claims belong in unverified[]. Bump last_verified each time an entry is added or revised.

updates[].name: Short human-readable title.
updates[].kind: One of: core | spam | core+spam | policy | qrg | product | schema | cwv.
updates[].source: Required. Must resolve to a Google-owned domain (developers.google.com, web.dev, chrome.com, blog.google, support.google.com).
updates[].notes: Optional. One-line summary of practitioner impact.

unverified[].date: ISO date or YYYY-MM-xx if exact date unconfirmed.
unverified[].third_party_sources: Array of source URLs that originated the claim.
unverified[].primary_source_check: URL of the Google-owned page that would confirm or refute.
unverified[].status: Explicit recommendation. Audit scripts MUST NOT encode unverified claims until promoted to updates[].

updates.name: March 2024 Core Update + spam updates
updates.notes: Helpful Content System merged into core ranking; new spam policies for scaled content, site reputation, and expired domain abuse.

updates.name: INP replaces FID
updates.notes: INP becomes a stable Core Web Vital (March 2024). FID dropped from CrUX/PSI 2024-09-09.

updates.name: Site reputation abuse enforcement begins
updates.notes: Manual actions phase begins. First wave hits Forbes Advisor, CNN Underscored, WSJ Buy Side.

updates.name: June 2024 Spam Update
updates.notes: Targeted policy-violating sites.

updates.name: August 2024 Core Update
updates.notes: Google: 'designed to surface more useful content'. Partial Helpful Content recoveries reported.

updates.name: November 2024 Core Update
updates.notes: 24-day rollout.

updates.name: Site Reputation Abuse policy clarified
updates.notes: No amount of first-party involvement changes the third-party nature. Section-level removals (CNN Underscored /reviews, Forbes /health) within hours.

updates.name: December 2024 Core Update
updates.notes: Tight rollout (~7 days).

updates.name: December 2024 Spam Update
updates.notes: Cited as targeting scaled content abuse.

updates.name: QRG update (Jan 2025)
updates.notes: Adds formal definition of generative AI (§2.1). Defines scaled content abuse, expired-domain abuse, filler content under §4.6 Spammy Webpages. Lowest rating triggered when all/almost all MC is copied, paraphrased, or AI-generated.

updates.name: AI Mode experimental launch
updates.notes: Initially Google One AI Premium / Labs (US). Gemini 2.0 backend. Query fan-out technique.

updates.name: March 2025 Core Update
updates.notes: 14-day rollout.

updates.name: AI Mode general rollout (US)
updates.notes: No Labs sign-up required. Gemini 2.5 in AI Mode and AI Overviews.

updates.name: Structured data deprecation
updates.notes: Phased out: Course Info, Claim Review, Estimated Salary, Learning Video, Special Announcement (carryover), Vehicle Listing.

updates.name: June 2025 Core Update
updates.notes: 16-day rollout. Some Sep 2023 HCU partial recoveries.

updates.name: AI Mode expands to 180+ countries
updates.notes: English first. Robby Stein: 'active' AI Mode begins with dining reservations.

updates.name: QRG update (Sept 2025)
updates.notes: Adds AI Overview rating examples. Expands YMYL to include political/social topics. Google: 'no change to rating guidance'.

updates.name: December 2025 Core Update
updates.notes: 18-day rollout. Third core update of 2025. Reported eCommerce skew per Amsive analysis.

updates.name: February 2026 Discover Update
updates.notes: Official dashboard name: February 2026 Discover update (started Feb 5, ~21d rollout, English/US first). Google's blog framed it as a core update to Discover (not general web Search). Rewards original/in-depth/local content; reduces sensational/clickbait.

updates.name: March 2026 Spam Update
updates.notes: Fastest spam update on record — 19h30m rollout (completed under a day), days before the March 2026 core update.

updates.name: March 2026 Core Update
updates.notes: Started Mar 27, completed Apr 8 (12-day rollout). First web-Search core update of 2026.

updates.name: Back button hijacking spam policy
updates.notes: New 'malicious practices' spam policy: manipulating browser history to defeat the Back button (incl. third-party ad/library scripts). Announced 2026-04-13; enforcement live since 2026-06-15 (manual actions + automated demotions).

updates.name: FAQ rich results retired
updates.notes: FAQ rich results no longer shown for any site (supersedes the Aug 2023 gov/health restriction). Rich Results Test + report support drops Jun 2026; Search Console API support removed Aug 2026. Use QAPage for genuine single-question pages; FAQPage has no Google SERP benefit.

updates.name: Spam policies update (gen-AI scaled content)
updates.notes: Scaled content abuse now explicitly names 'using generative AI tools to generate many pages without adding value' (and automated transformations like translating). Expired-domain and site-reputation abuse remain.

updates.name: Generative AI optimization guide
updates.notes: Official optimizing-for-generative-AI-features guidance: gen-AI optimization IS SEO; you do NOT need new AI files/markup/Markdown/chunking/AI-rewrites. Google Search ignores llms.txt.

updates.name: Google I/O 2026: AI Mode updates
updates.notes: Google's last official model naming for AI Mode/AI Overviews is a custom version of Gemini 2.5. AI Mode 1B+ monthly users was reported from Google I/O 2026 keynote coverage; not confirmed on a Google-owned source. New intelligent Search box; Information Agents, generative UI, and agentic checkout rolling out summer 2026.

updates.name: hasAdultConsideration property added
updates.notes: Product variant / Merchant listing; required for adult-oriented products; only supported value https://schema.org/SexualContentConsideration.

updates.name: May 2026 Core Update
updates.notes: Completed June 2, 2026 (~11d21h rollout). Second core update of 2026. Global, all languages. Google: 'a regular update designed to better surface relevant, satisfying content from all types of sites.' Superseded as most-recent by the June 2026 spam update (2026-06-24); still the most recent core update as of 2026-07-02.

updates.name: Search Console Generative AI performance reports
updates.notes: Dedicated AI Overviews + AI Mode (and Discover) gen-AI visibility report. Impressions only (no clicks/CTR/position/query); subset rollout. AI Mode also rolls into standard Performance totals.

updates.name: Guidance on third-party SEO tools, services, and advice
updates.notes: No tool guarantees rankings; third-party tools lack access to Google's internal ranking data; Google doesn't endorse vendors; evaluate AEO/GEO claims vs official guidance; GSC is the first-party source.

updates.name: June 2026 Spam Update
updates.notes: Started June 24, completed June 26 (~2d1h rollout). Normal spam update, all languages and locations. Most recent confirmed ranking update as of 2026-07-02 (dashboard-verified).

updates.name: Merchant Center video_link serving-eligible
updates.notes: Product video_link attribute becomes serving-eligible; product videos can surface in shopping experiences.
